name: Fairfield Recreation Center
description: Fairfield Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Kinston, NC. There are 5 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and water.

name: Kinston Community Center
description: Kinston Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Kinston, NC. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.
